### Preset name

<!-- e.g. "Comic / Manga", "Tattoo flash", "Anatomical diagram" -->

### What kind of input does it target?

<!-- Describe the typical input image: color count, line weight, noise level, source. -->

### Sample images

<!-- Attach 2-4 representative inputs. Public-domain or your own work, please. -->

### Suggested VTracer parameters (if you've tried tuning)

- color mode:
- filter speckle:
- color precision:
- layer difference:
- corner threshold:
- splice threshold:
- path simplify mode:

### Why isn't an existing preset enough?

<!-- e.g. "Logo flattens fine details", "Photo over-smooths the line work" -->
